changeSet.author: rshmidt
changeSet.sql:
drop table if exists users;; create table users ( id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(), email varchar(512) unique not null, password_hash text, first_name varchar(256), last_name varchar(256), role varchar(512) default 'USER', status varchar(512) default 'ACTIVE', registered_at timestamp default now(),
constraint uq_users_email unique (email) );;

changeSet.author: rshmidt
changeSet.sql:
drop table if exists categories;; create table categories ( id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(), name_ru varchar(1024) unique not null, name_en varchar(1024) unique not null, icon varchar(512) not null, user_id uuid not null references users (id), created_at timestamp default now(),
constraint uq_categories_name_ru unique (name_ru), constraint uq_categories_name_en unique (name_en), constraint uq_categories_name unique (name_ru, name_en) );;

changeSet.author: rshmidt
